criteria.label: List the four high-level training stages in order from pretraining to release.
criteria.example: Pretrain → SFT → feedback alignment (RLHF/RLAIF) → evals/red team → released model ID.

criteria.label: State one thing pretraining optimizes for vs one thing alignment optimizes for.
criteria.example: Pretraining: next-token prediction on text. Alignment: helpful/safe assistant behavior and refusals.

criteria.label: Explain why a model version string matters to developers.
criteria.example: Pinning `claude-sonnet-…` locks behavior and knowledge cutoff until we test and migrate to a newer snapshot.

criteria.label: Give one training limitation that still affects users after alignment.
criteria.example: Knowledge cutoff—training does not add live facts; I must paste sources or use tools for recent events.
